'''nagatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uhuru|uhuru]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uhuru|uhuru]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nagatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nægæthæth|nægæthæth]] || [[word:nægæthæj|nægæthæj]] || [[word:nægæthæsh|nægæthæsh]] || [[word:nægæthæ|nægæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nagagathath|nagagathath]] || [[word:nagagathaj|nagagathaj]] || [[word:nagagathash|nagagathash]] || [[word:nagagatha|nagagatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nagathath|nagathath]] || [[word:nagathaj|nagathaj]] || [[word:nagathash|nagathash]] || [[word:nagatha|nagatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nagafthath|nagafthath]] || [[word:nagafthaj|nagafthaj]] || [[word:nagafthash|nagafthash]] || [[word:nagafthaf|nagafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nagathatha|nagathatha]] || [[word:nagathaja|nagathaja]] || [[word:nagathasha|nagathasha]] || [[word:nagathaka|nagathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nagathath|nagathath]] || [[word:nagathaj|nagathaj]] || [[word:nagathash|nagathash]] || [[word:nagatha|nagatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nagathathal|nagathathal]] || [[word:nagathajal|nagathajal]] || [[word:nagathashal|nagathashal]] || [[word:nagathakal|nagathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nagathathatha|nagathathatha]] || [[word:nagathajaja|nagathajaja]] || [[word:nagathashasha|nagathashasha]] || [[word:nagathaka|nagathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nagathathan|nagathathan]] || [[word:nagathajan|nagathajan]] || [[word:nagathashan|nagathashan]] || [[word:nagathakan|nagathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nagathathaoro|nagathathaoro]] || [[word:nagathajaoro|nagathajaoro]] || [[word:nagathashaoro|nagathashaoro]] || [[word:nagathakaoro|nagathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
